rules.description: RESPA § 8 — potential kickback or referral fee language
rules.suggestion: This language may imply a prohibited kickback or unearned fee arrangement under RESPA § 8. Remove or rephrase, and consult your broker.
Describing proximity to religious institutions may imply religious preference. Use 'near local community centers' instead.
"Exclusive" can imply discriminatory selection criteria. Use "private gated community" or "secure neighborhood" instead.

rules.description: References to neighborhood character by demographics
rules.suggestion: These terms can be interpreted as coded demographic references. Describe specific improvements or amenities instead.
